biography: Gwen Adora is a performer, host, internet personality and pure joy based in Toronto, Canada. Known for her unapologetic approach to self-expression, body positivity, and queer representation, she is a standout presence in the digital space. Gwen has successfully merged her passion for fashion, drag, and self-love into engaging and relatable storytelling. In 2023, she starred as a subject in Netflix's MoneyShot documentary. Gwen's bubbly personality has lead to her co-hosting Siri Dahl's Corn Telethon (2024), bar tending on Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen (2023), and as an interviewee on Crave TV's 1 Queen, 5 Queers (2022). In addition to her mainstream pursuits, she is a multi-award winner in the adult industry.
name: Gwen Adora
